recent_market_context: 2026-05-29: VIX 15.4 (calm), SPY trending up (EMA9 748.06 > EMA21 736.9), no-trade flag clear. Low-volatility, mild risk-on environment. Watchlist empty (0 candidates): the IEX-feed scan's rel_vol (today cumulative vol / prior full-day vol) stays below 1.5x for nearly all symbols early in the session, so the momentum filter rejects everything.
notes_for_next_session: For 10:15 AM entry agent (2026-05-29): Watchlist is EMPTY (0 candidates). Root cause is structural, not a market call: premarket_scan.py uses the Alpaca IEX feed and defines rel_vol as today's cumulative daily-bar volume divided by the prior full trading day's volume, plus a gap-up>=2% gate -- so early in the session almost nothing clears the 1.5x rel_vol bar. Recommend re-running premarket_scan.py later in the session once current-day volume has accumulated before attempting any entries.
